reasoning: After reviewing the Comments History section, I found a critical staff note dated Jan 15, 2026 indicating a PATTERN ALERT. While John Lee was previously a loyal customer (28 orders with only 2 refunds over 2.5 years), there has been a significant behavior change in the last 48 days: 9 orders with 8 refund requests (89% refund rate). The claim types have shifted from 'damaged' to 'not received', and all tracking shows items were delivered. The current claim of 'wrong item shipped' follows this suspicious pattern. The staff note explicitly recommends escalation for fraud review. Given this documented pattern of potential refund abuse, I am escalating this request for fraud review rather than approving or denying outright.
